title: Tokyo Dark

notes: After disabling Esync, the game stops crashing (it crashed nearly immediately and reproducible before that) and seems to be playable fine. I only took a short peek (5-10 minutes) at it, so there might be some issues later on.
title: Tokyo Dark

notes: Runs without tweaks but persistent crashes during gameplay preventing progress. When using 'wined3d' game sits as "running" without any window, 'nod3d11' causes the game to exit instantly and with  'noesync' or 'forcelgadd' the game is playable but continues to crash regularly.
